symptom: short stature with bones that fractured easily and a small receding jaw
hook: the bones were strikingly dense and white yet the fingertips looked dissolved away at the very tips
whatYouSee: Uniformly dense white bones with the fingertip bones partly dissolved and an underdeveloped jaw.
whyItMatters: It is an inherited sclerosing bone disease that makes bone dense yet brittle so fractures are common despite all the density.
treatment: Care is supportive with fracture management and dental and orthopaedic follow up.
takeaway: Dense brittle bones with dissolved fingertips and a small jaw point to pycnodysostosis.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with short stature with bones that fractured easily and a small receding jaw.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And the bones were strikingly dense and white yet the fingertips looked dissolved away at the very tips.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Pycnodysostosis

👀 What you see:
Uniformly dense white bones with the fingertip bones partly dissolved and an underdeveloped jaw.

🦴 Why it matters:
It is an inherited sclerosing bone disease that makes bone dense yet brittle so fractures are common despite all the density.

📝 Takeaway:
Dense brittle bones with dissolved fingertips and a small jaw point to pycnodysostosis.

💊 Treatment:
Care is supportive with fracture management and dental and orthopaedic follow up.
